get.summary: Auth service root
get.description: Returns a simple greeting confirming the auth service is reachable.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -sS -X GET "$FLUIDE_BASE_URL/api/v1" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $FLUIDE_ACCESS_TOKEN" \
  -H "X-Fluide-Api-Key: $FLUIDE_API_KEY" \
  -H "X-Fluide-Client-Id: fluide-developer"

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
import os
import requests

base_url = os.environ["FLUIDE_BASE_URL"]
headers = {
        "Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['FLUIDE_ACCESS_TOKEN']}",
        "X-Fluide-Api-Key": os.environ["FLUIDE_API_KEY"],
        "X-Fluide-Client-Id": "fluide-developer",
}

response = requests.get(
    f"{base_url}/api/v1",
    headers=headers,
    timeout=30,
)
response.raise_for_status()
print(response.json())

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php
$baseUrl = getenv("FLUIDE_BASE_URL");
$ch = curl_init($baseUrl . "/api/v1");
curl_setopt_array($ch, [
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
        'Authorization: Bearer ' . getenv('FLUIDE_ACCESS_TOKEN'),
        'X-Fluide-Api-Key: ' . getenv('FLUIDE_API_KEY'),
        'X-Fluide-Client-Id: fluide-developer',
    ],
]);
$response = curl_exec($ch);
if ($response === false) throw new RuntimeException(curl_error($ch));
$status = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
if ($status >= 400) throw new RuntimeException("HTTP $status: $response");
echo $response;

base_url = os.environ["FLUIDE_BASE_URL"]
headers = {
        "Authorization": f"Bearer {os.environ['FLUIDE_ACCESS_TOKEN']}",
        "X-Fluide-Api-Key": os.environ["FLUIDE_API_KEY"],
        "X-Fluide-Client-Id": "fluide-developer",
}

response = requests.get(
    f"{base_url}/api/v1/transactions/detail?compositeId=INVOICE%3A3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
    headers=headers,
    timeout=30,
)
response.raise_for_status()
print(response.json())

        'X-Fluide-Api-Key: ' . getenv('FLUIDE_API_KEY'),

]);

echo $response;

info.title: Fluide Books API
info.description: Accounting: chart of accounts, journal entries, invoices, bills, banking, budgets, and payroll GL integration. In the API playground, click Authorize and provide Bearer JWT, X-Fluide-Api-Key, and X-Fluide-Client-Id (fluide-developer).

tags.name: App
tags.description: Service root and build metadata. Use for quick connectivity checks.

tags.name: Prometheus
tags.description: Prometheus scrape endpoint in text exposition format. Configure your metrics collector to poll this path on each service.

bearer.description: Access token JWT. Use as Authorization: Bearer <token>. In the API playground, paste the JWT only.

fluideApiKey.name: X-Fluide-Api-Key
fluideApiKey.description: Developer API key (fl_dev_...). Required on every API call with a machine access token.

fluideClientId.name: X-Fluide-Client-Id
fluideClientId.description: First-party client audience. Must match the fluide_client_id claim on the JWT. Use fluide-developer for Connect.

fluideApiSecret.name: X-Fluide-Api-Secret
fluideApiSecret.description: API secret used only during token exchange. Never send on product routes.

message.description: Human-readable outcome message (localized when i18n is configured)

data.description: Response payload when success is true

message.description: Human-readable error message (localized when i18n is configured)

code.description: Stable machine-readable error code for client handling and support

errors.description: Field-level validation errors keyed by property name

from: from must be a valid date

companyId.description: Subsidiary to merge into; defaults to primary company in tenant.

template.description: AUTO resolves from company country (and onboarding macro-region when present).

companyId.description: Subsidiary (company) scope; omit only when intentionally creating an org-wide account row.

defaultCurrency.description: Default currency (ISO 4217) for UI display only. Accounts are multi-currency; postings record currency on journal lines.

isMultiCurrency.description: Whether this account supports multiple currencies (default true).

defaultCurrency.description: Default currency (ISO 4217) for UI display only.

isMultiCurrency.description: Whether this account supports multiple currencies

isCashAccount.description: Marks this ASSET account as a cash/bank/mobile-money float account for liquidity reporting and payment journals.

accountId.description: Account ID to debit or credit

lineCurrency.description: ISO 4217 line currency when different from functional

idempotencyKey.description: Idempotent create key (duplicate requests return the same journal entry)

discountValue.description: Discount: percent (0–100) or fixed currency amount

taxValue.description: Tax: percent of pre-tax line or fixed currency amount

glAccountId.description: Resolved GL account id for this line

taxCodeId.description: Tax code id for this line

companyId.description: Company (subsidiary) that owns this AR document. Defaults to the user’s primary company.

lineItems.description: Line items (required). Header subtotal/tax/total are derived server-side.
Full replacement line items (draft-only). Totals are re-derived.

externalReference.description: External reference (bank transfer reference, cash receipt #, cheque #, etc.)

evidenceDocumentIds.description: Evidence file upload ids (PDF receipts, bank slips, etc.)

cashAccountId.description: Cash/bank GL account to debit for non-FluidePay payments (required when paymentSource != FLUIDEPAY). Must be a cash-like ASSET account.

fileIds.description: File upload ids from fluide-utils file-management

fluidePayTransactionId.description: References the payment transaction in FluidePay.

companyId.description: Subsidiary / company for multi-entity AR. Null only for legacy rows before this column existed.

postedAt.description: When set, the invoice has been posted to the ledger and must not be edited directly.

sentByEmail.description: Email of the user who last sent the invoice (issuer notification fallback).

glAccountId.description: The resolved GL account for this line item at posting time.

taxCodeId.description: Optional tax code reference (jurisdiction/rate is handled by the tax engine later).

email.description: Customer email for Flutterwave customer creation

paymentNotificationEmail.description: Email notified when invoice payments are received

providerFetchedAt.description: ISO timestamp when provider returned this rate

companyId.description: Subsidiary this mapping applies to (must match payroll run companyId)

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency this mapping applies to

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2; defaults to the company’s registered country from auth context

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency to create accounts/mappings for

discountValue.description: Discount: percent (0–100) or fixed currency amount

taxValue.description: Tax: percent of pre-tax line or fixed currency amount

glAccountId.description: Resolved GL account id for this line

taxCodeId.description: Tax code id for this line

lineItems.description: Line items (required). Header subtotal/tax/total are derived server-side.
Full replacement line items (draft-only). Totals are re-derived.

externalReference.description: External reference (bank transfer reference, cash receipt #, cheque #, etc.)

evidenceDocumentIds.description: Evidence file upload ids (PDF receipts, bank slips, etc.)

cashAccountId.description: Cash/bank GL account to credit for non-FluidePay payments (required when paymentSource != FLUIDEPAY). Must be a cash-like ASSET account.

glAccountId.description: Chart of accounts id for this bank / cash ledger

journalEntryLineId.description: Journal entry line to reconcile against

month.description: Calendar month 1–12 within the budget fiscal year

actualAmount.description: Optional actual total override instead of GL rollup

period.description: YYYY-MM (defaults to current UTC month). Idempotent per asset + month.

proceeds.description: Sale proceeds (used for gain/loss; cash receipt posted separately)

gainLossAccountId.description: Gain/loss on disposal P&L account (required when gain/loss is non-zero)

companyId.description: Override primary company when user has several

utilsFileIds.description: File ids returned by fluide-utils file management after generation

vatEnabled.description: Enable VAT/tax by default in document editors

payoutDetails.description: Optional payout details for AP disbursement
Optional payout details for AP disbursement

fromOffsetAccountId.description: Offset account in from-company books (e.g. expense or AP).

toOffsetAccountId.description: Offset account in to-company books (e.g. revenue or AR).

companyId.description: Books on which elimination entry is posted (defaults to fromCompanyId).

rateDate.description: Closing rate date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today UTC.

period.description: Period key for idempotency (YYYY-MM). Defaults from rateDate.
